name: Message Node
description: Displays a message and passes it through.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    msg_val = inputs.get('msg')
    msg = str(msg_val) if msg_val is not None else ''
    self.log_info(f'MESSAGE: {msg}')
    await self.set_output('out', msg)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'out': msg}

async def on_parameter_changed(self, name, value):
    if name == 'msg':
        self.parameters['out'] = value
